heroDescription: Adhyatm Parivar is a vast organization dedicated to the benevolent Jain Sashan for the world. The organization is committed to making every possible effort for religious and spiritual progress in society. To enable every human being to elevate their life, the organization manages the protection of ancient heritage, discourses, and various rituals of Jain Sashan. Through this, feelings of good conduct, faith, and dedication are developed. The family's presence extends across India and abroad.
lettersTitle: A few selected offerings from the response letters...

logoDescription.title: ...The secret of the Adhyatm Parivar logo adorned with the seven fields...

items.title: 1. Jinpratima
items.desc: The replica of the supreme entity of this world who shows the path to becoming completely happy forever.

items.title: 2. Jinmandir
items.desc: The most excellent holy place of that supreme entity!

items.title: 3. Jinagam
items.desc: All information and the map of the path to becoming happy!!

items.title: 4-5. Shraman-Shramani (Ogha)
items.desc: Those who themselves walk on that path with effort according to this information and map, and show this true path to the world!

items.title: 6-7. Shravak-Shravika (Charvala)
items.desc: Those who are dedicated to this path, who desire to walk on this path, and who offer their body, mind, and wealth for it!

items.title: Vrishabh (Bull)
items.desc: The symbol of Sri Adinath Parmatma, the first order founder of this Bharat Kshetra!

items.title: Simha (Lion)
items.desc: The symbol of Sri Mahavir Parmatma, the last order founder of this Bharat Kshetra!

items.title: Dharmachakra
items.desc: The 24 spokes of the Dharmachakra reminding of the 24 Tirthankaras of this Avasarpini!

items.title: Kamala (Lotus)
items.desc: Indicator of that detached state which is to be attained through the devotion and protection of the seven fields!

vibhag.title: Jinmurti Vibhag
vibhag.description: Work of Lep-Op etc. by scientifically proven traditional method for the protection of all Jinpratimas from ancient to modern times across India. Construction of new, beautiful stone and metal statues, prevention of Ashatana of statues etc.

vibhag.title: Jinmandir Vibhag
vibhag.description: Resolving problems like leakage specific to Jinmandirs across India, purification every year as much as possible, workshop etc. for new Jinalaya construction.

vibhag.title: Jinagam Vibhag
vibhag.description: Cataloging Jain manuscripts located across India and abroad, editing properly about 15,000 ancient Jain texts proof of more than 1.5 crore verses, and publication of various books etc.

vibhag.title: Adhyatm Vibhag
vibhag.description: Four limbs of Jain order - Sadhu, Sadhvi, Shravak and Shravika - implementing solutions by researching wherever there are obstacles in the practice of religion for all of them. About 18 to 20 types of works are going on in this.

sba.title: Tribute to Shasan Bhakti
sba.subtitle: A glimpse of the Shasan service - safety works being done by Adhyatm Parivar
sba.comingSoon: New photos will be added soon

letters.quote: Vaccination etc. is extremely risky for the safety of the statue, and current artisans are not at all reliable for works like Op. Therefore, it is beneficial to get work done with the cooperation of Adhyatm Parivar organization in this regard.
letters.author: Babu Amichand Pannalal

letters.quote: In the present time, innocent land has become very rare in the city for Mahatmas who follow pure conduct. Your family has taken up the task of saving them from the disregard of the order by creating artificial innocent land for them, for which lakhs of thanks to Adhyatm Parivar...
letters.author: Dharmalab of Muni Jagatshekharvijay

letters.quote: Your family accepted our Shri Sangh's request for the protection of such Jinalaya which is the heritage of the order. Much appreciation to Shri Adhyatm Parivar for that.
letters.author: Shri Shwetambar Murtipujak Tapagachha

letters.quote: The complaints regarding Kundi in our society till now have been resolved by working under your guidance this time. The complaints have almost stopped. It is my request to all Sanghs that you all should also get Kundi made in this way.
letters.author: Shri Shwetambar Murtipujak Tapagachha

letters.quote: Just as the Ganges emerging from Gangotri moves forward and spreads on a vast canvas, similarly may the Shrut Yatra of your family also expand on the canvas, this is the prayer to the Lord. Once again, much appreciation for this work of yours.
letters.author: Shraman Bhagwant

letters.quote: Many such ancient literatures which were generally unavailable and unrevealed were first published after research and editing by the revered ones, much appreciation for this.
letters.author: Su. Babubhai Saremal, Bedawala

letters.quote: In our Shri Chintamani Parshvanath Jinalaya, water used to come from the roof during the monsoon season for quite some time. We contacted you in this regard and you completed that work of ours very beautifully. Now not even a bit of water comes from there and we have been saved from the Ashatana of the Jinalaya.
letters.author: Shri Indrapuri Jain Sangh, Vadodara

letters.quote: Specifically for our Jin temple from Dist. Dungarpur (Raj.) to Shri Adinathji Jain Ve.Mu.Pu.Sangh, temple equipment of brass sent by you, for that our Shri Sangh appreciates you.
letters.author: Shri Sambhavnathji Jain Shwetambar Murtipujak

letters.quote: For Ayambilshala and revered Sadhu-Sadhviji Bhagwants in our Shri Sangh to get hot water cooled quickly, water stand has been received through you. Shri Sangh appreciates this excellent work of yours very much.
letters.author: Shri Rander Road Jain Sangh, Surat

forms.title: Registration Form
forms.noForms: No forms are currently available for registration.
